summary: Phase 8A: Live Execution Hardening - All tests passed. Backend: 31/31 tests (100%). Frontend: 16/16 UI tests (100%). New wallet endpoint, live orders endpoint, and enhanced execution status with full order lifecycle tracking fields all working correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/execution/wallet has mode, authenticated, balance_usdc, live_ready, warnings fields
GET /api/execution/wallet warnings is empty array in paper mode
GET /api/execution/orders returns empty array (no live orders yet)
GET /api/execution/mode has all expected fields (mode, live_adapter_authenticated, credentials, live_enabled, safe_to_switch_live)
Regression: GET /api/config includes persisted and last_saved
Regression: GET /api/alerts/test works (status=skipped - telegram not configured)
frontend_ui_tests: TopBar mode-indicator has neutral styling (text-zinc-300, NOT text-red)
TopBar wallet-widget element exists (hidden when not authenticated)
All 7 nav items present: Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings
P&L Curve section visible on Overview
Execution Mode section with PAPER/SHADOW/LIVE buttons all present
regression_tests: All 7 nav items present in sidebar

seed_data_creation: None - tested existing API flows without creating persistent test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8A Live Execution Hardening complete. NEW ENDPOINTS: GET /api/execution/wallet (returns mode, authenticated, balance_usdc, live_ready, warnings), GET /api/execution/orders (returns LiveOrderRecord array from live_orders MongoDB collection). ENHANCED: GET /api/execution/status live_adapter now has open_orders, partial_orders, last_api_call, last_status_refresh, recent_errors fields for full order lifecycle tracking. LiveAdapter at /app/backend/engine/live_adapter.py has full order lifecycle: submitted→open→partially_filled→filled/cancelled/expired. Background polling runs every 5s when authenticated, uses get_order() to check open/partial orders. LiveOrderRecord persisted to MongoDB live_orders collection. TopBar mode indicator uses MODE_COLORS map: paper=text-zinc-300, shadow=text-amber-400, live=text-red-400 with pulse dot for live. Wallet widget shows balance when authenticated. Without POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY, live mode blocked with 400. All previous Phase 8 features preserved.
